title: Fallback when balanced frontier dataset cannot be built
description: model_performance_frontier aborts when dataset.build_from_feedback_window throws for insufficient class/label overlap during balanced regression dataset build. Catch balanced build failures, fall back to unbalanced datasets, and checkpoint File.read.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
Fixed balanced regression dataset failure and determinism warning.

Changes:
- Wrapped champion YAML `File.read()` in `Step.checkpoint(function() ... end)`.
- Wrapped balanced `plexus.dataset.build_from_feedback_window` in `pcall`; when class overlap is insufficient it now notifies and tries unbalanced.
- Wrapped unbalanced build in `pcall`; if that also fails, the procedure skips regression evaluation for that variant instead of aborting the entire run. Feedback evaluation still runs.
- Added config regression assertions for checkpointed File.read and protected balanced/unbalanced dataset builds.

Validation:
- `pytest -q plexus/cli/procedure/test_model_performance_frontier.py MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/test_model_frontier_runtime.py` -> 12 passed
- Procedure YAML safe-load/sanity check -> passed
- py_compile -> passed
